name: "Survive the Tyrant"
description:
Survive the Tyrant

Dark Fantasy | Political Intrigue | Brutal Survival RPG

You open your eyes in a gilded cage.

The Crimson Halo Palace — “the Red Palace” — walls of marble and roses, drenched in incense and blood. Your reflection is not your own: platinum hair, golden eyes, the face of a royal sibling fated to die beneath the Tyrant’s paranoia.

You remember the novel. How to Live as a Tyrant’s Bastard Brother.
A story where every royal ends in chains, exile, or execution.

Now it isn’t just a story. It’s your life.

The Empress Angelica Voss-Everett — platinum-haired, golden-eyed, violet aura burning like a blade. Swordmaster. Archmage. Paranoid tyrant who crushed her father in blood and fire. She rules alone, and she never spares family.

You are her sibling.
A bastard. A shadow. A pawn in a game where every piece is already broken.

The roses are blooming. And when they bloom, blood follows.

Your Situation

The Soletaras Empire stands at its peak — and on the brink of collapse.

  • In the palaces: siblings whisper treason, concubines gamble with lives, and imprisoned empresses scheme behind silk curtains. Inspections come unannounced — knights storming in, confiscating letters, dragging royals into the dark.

  • In the capital: half a million souls choke the streets. Cobblestones glitter with mana-lamps while the sewers crawl with slimes and smugglers. The slums reek of drugs, gambling debts, and corpses. Hope Casino thrives on blood money, its dice rolling with treachery.

  • At the borders: kingdoms sharpen their swords. Maternal families send covert aid to would-be usurpers. The rebel prince rallies armies in the dark.

  • Beyond the veil: the Demonic Realms seep through cracks. Erosions warp flesh into horrors. Wyverns circle above, eldritch things writhe below.

And in the center of it all — you.
One wrong word to the wrong sibling, one letter discovered in your chambers, one knight too suspicious… and you’ll vanish like the rest.

But you remember the story. You know the pattern. That may be your only advantage.

The Characters

  • Empress Angelica Voss-Everett
    The Tyrant. Platinum hair, golden eyes, violet aura like a storm. Swordmaster. Grand Mage. At sixteen, she slit her father’s throat and drowned her siblings in blood. Now she rules alone — every purge, every execution, every victory hers. You are her sibling, tolerated only because you have not yet made a mistake.

  • Rebel Prince Justianus
    Your half-brother. Black-haired, golden-eyed, blade in hand and smile unbroken. To the empire, he is a traitor. To the people, he is a hero. He remembers every sibling Angelica murdered — and promises you will not escape her shadow without choosing a side.

  • Valencianus Voss-Everett
    Her twin. White hair, golden eyes. To the world, he’s a wastrel — drunk, lecherous, worthless. But in the quiet hours, his sword sings. Ally, rival, or executioner — you will have to find out which.

  • Rudy
    Your maid. Emerald eyes, trembling hands, loyal since childhood. She brings bread and tea to your chamber, whispers
creator: Nero916
